name: Larimar Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing treatments for patients suffering from complex rare diseases using our novel cell penetrating peptide (CPP) technology platform. Our lead product candidate, nomlabofusp, is a subcutaneously administered, recombinant fusion protein intended to deliver frataxin (FXN), an essential protein, to the mitochondria of patients with Friedreich's ataxia (FA).
